overall.description: A smooth camera walk through an ancient Greek temple in Assassin's Creed Odyssey, ascending the stone stairs of the Sanctuary of Delphi, traversing the grand colonnade, and approaching the guarded entrance to the Temple of Apollo. The scene features massive fluted columns, ceremonial braziers, and NPCs performing ritual gestures.

large bronze fire bowls burning on the left side of the stairs
large bronze fire bowls burning on the right side of the stairs
stone planters with orange flowers flanking the bottom of the stairs
stone planters with orange flowers flanking the bottom of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the base of a grand ancient Greek temple with massive stone columns rising ahead. The camera ascends wide stone stairs flanked by burning bronze braziers and potted flowers, approaching the towering entrance of the Sanctuary of Delphi under bright midday sun.

zone name changes from Sanctuary of Delphi to Temple of Apollo

agents.ego_description: walking through the colonnade between towering stone columns toward the inner sanctuary

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress standing with a child, looking toward the temple interior
group of worshippers with raised hands performing ritual gestures toward the inner temple

entered.detail: decorative wooden lattice panels filling the spaces between the outer columns
decorative wooden lattice panels filling the spaces between the outer columns
dark rectangular entrance to the inner temple sanctuary visible through the columns

segments.scene_description: Moving into the sheltered colonnade, the camera passes between massive stone columns with decorative lattice screens on the sides. Several NPCs are present, including a woman with a child and worshippers performing rituals, as the zone transitions to the Temple of Apollo and the inner doorway becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner temple entrance with ceremonial guards

events.description: exits the outer colonnade and approaches the inner sanctuary entrance
slows approach as reaching the guarded temple entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the dark inner sanctuary entrance flanked by two armored guards

decorated stone wall with geometric patterns and painted figures flanking the door
bronze fire bowls burning on stone pedestals flanking the inner entrance
bronze fire bowls burning on stone pedestals flanking the inner entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the inner sanctuary entrance, leaving the outer columns behind. The camera moves toward a dark doorway flanked by decorated stone walls and burning ceremonial braziers, where two armored temple guards stand at attention, creating a solemn atmosphere at the threshold of the Temple of Apollo.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bright, open exterior of a grand Greek sanctuary into the solemn, guarded threshold of an inner temple. It begins at the base of the Sanctuary of Delphi, ascending wide stone stairs flanked by burning bronze braziers and potted flowers under a bright midday sun. As the camera moves into the sheltered colonnade, the open light shifts to a shaded corridor of massive stone columns and decorative lattice screens, passing worshippers and a woman with a child. The scene then transitions toward the inner doorway of the Temple of Apollo, leaving the outer columns behind as the environment becomes more enclosed. Finally, the camera approaches a dark doorway flanked by decorated stone walls and ceremonial braziers, where two armored temple guards stand at attention.
